Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.util

Class TSBase

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.util.TSBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
TSDcDft, TSPolynomialFitter
public class TSBase extends Object
This is the base class for all AAVSO TS-based algorithms translated from the ts1201.f Fortran code.

    • TSBase

      public TSBase(List<ValidObservation> observations)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      observations - The observations over which to perform a period analysis.

    • matinv

      protected void matinv()

    • smooth

      protected double smooth(double dtime)
      Applies a function defined by polynomial or Fourier coefficients to the specified time parameter.
      Parameters:
      dtime - The time parameter to which the function is to be applied.
      Returns:
      The resulting of applying the function to the parameter.

    • getZeroPointOffset

      protected double getZeroPointOffset()
      Return the zero-point offset that must be subtracted from each time step when creating a model equation or performing a model fit operation. Obviously, the point in time at which this is called matters. It must not be called until after load_raw(), and so also statcomp(), has been invoked.
      Returns:
      The zero-point offset/term/subrahend.
